SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Archer
Archer class that has medium health and damage, but can attack from a distance.
ArcherProjectile
Arrow that is faster than the mage projectile but has a limited range.
AttackException
Attack exception to process child exceptions
ClassSelectScreen
Game starting screen, where player can chose what class he wants to play
CoolDownException
Exception, that is being thrown when player attack is on cooldown
Enemy
The Enemy class is an abstract class that represents a generic enemy in the game.
EnemyInterface
Interface for enemies
EnemyTest
 
EventListener
Main listener class that calculates the whole collision logic in game.
EventListenerTest
 
ExceptionsTest
 
GameOverScreen
Game over screen, where player can chose either to continue playing, or quit
GameScreen
Screen where the game is played.
Lwjgl3Launcher
Launches the desktop (LWJGL3) application.
Mage
Mage player class.
MageProjectile
Mage projectile that accelerates over time.
Main
Main class that loads all assetts, sets starting screen and disposes all assets when the game is closed.
Melee
Melee player class.
MeleeException
 
MeleeProjectile
Melee projectile, that is spawned neat player and represents "melee slash".
NoManaException
Exception, that is being thrown when player has no mana to perform attack
PauseScreen
Pause screen
Player
Abstract player class.
PlayerClass
 
PlayerClassTest
 
PlayerTest
 
Projectile
Projectile class
Skeleton
Skeleton class, one of the enemies in the game.
Slime
Slime class.
StartupHelper
A helper object for game startup, featuring three utilities related to LWJGL3 on various operating systems.
StatisticBar
Statistic bar class that shows all player stats like health, xp, mana and arrows.
Wave
The Wave class manages enemy waves in the game, controlling the timing and difficulty of enemy spawns.
WaveTest
